armor.name: Ancient Armor
armor.description: Ancient armor forged from Soralite Ingot . Crafted with the essence of a lost civilization, it boasts overwhelming defensive power and is capable of withstanding cataclysmic threats. Cold Resistance Lv. 2

armor.name: Ancient Shield
armor.description: A shield created using lost ancient technology. It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while. Its performance is said to be impossible to reproduce in the modern era.
